miami.today_forecast: Patchy Smoke then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
miami.today_detail: Patchy smoke before 8am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 84. Southeast wind 2 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
